yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah

To your point about some assignments that are way too close, there are sort of different types of keywords that we look for.
there are obviously the articles that we use, that we do, we target primary keywords.

So they mean the same thing and the search results are almost always the same, but some keywords are related.
So the search results are different.
And I can't like, I can't think of an example off the top of my head.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Teero and GrowthX to discuss content performance, lead generation, and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Traffic slightly down (7%) last week, likely due to US 4-day work week and two top-performing blogs dropping from position 1 to 2](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [9 dental office leads generated from GrowthX blogs since March; hygienist app download data needed](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Content refresh strategy needed for older posts (3-6 months) to maintain rankings](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Focus on hygienist-related content, insurance/RCM topics, and dental office marketing for future articles](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [15 articles published on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [Week 21 performance down 7% week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [Two top blogs ("what are dental assistants not allowed to do" and "dental hygienists benefits") dropped from position 1 to 2](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [Some blogs approaching 6 months old; may need updates to maintain rankings](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
  - [Next week's traffic expected to improve with new content batch](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [Plan to update older content (3-6 months) to maintain rankings](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Suggestions:](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
      - [Update publish dates](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
      - [Add new sections or content](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
      - [Improve interlinking](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
      - [Focus on articles dropping in rankings or underperforming](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Create separate workflow for content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)

### Lead Generation from Blogs

  - [Dental office leads from GrowthX blogs:](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [March: 1](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [April: 4](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [May: 3](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [June (so far): 2](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Top performing blogs for leads:](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Dental hygienist shortage (3 leads)](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
      - [Teero Reviews](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
      - [Dental holidays](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Dental hygiene temp jobs](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Need data on hygienist app downloads (not in HubSpot, possibly in PostHog)](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)

### Content Strategy and Preferences

  - [Focus on dental hygienist content, not other positions](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Prioritize topics related to:](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
      - [Hygienists in new states (CA, WA, OR, CO)](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
      - [Insurance verification](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
      - [Revenue cycle management](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
      - [Back office workflow problems](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Avoid:](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
      - [Non-hygienist staffing topics](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
      - [Legal content](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
      - [Independent contractor rules](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
  - [Upcoming product focus: insurance and dental office marketing](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)

### Keyword Research and Content Ideas

  - [Double down on topics related to staffing issues and hygienist shortages](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Jakub to share ChatGPT-generated list of potential topics in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [Team to review backlog for potential articles to approve](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nate to review and approve more articles from the backlog](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [Implement content refresh strategy for older posts](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Nate to share hygienist app download data from PostHog](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [Team to conduct keyword research around staffing issues and hygienist shortages](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [Review ChatGPT-generated topic list in Slack for new content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/AgBb6TzdTU23CTncLexuMKZne3mD7jry?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)

action_items.description: Monitor rankings of 6-month-old blog posts, esp. dental hygienist ones. Flag for updates if consistently dropping over 2-4 weeks.
Create workflow for refreshing content. Prioritize articles that dropped rankings or underperformed. Add to polish instructions.
Extract & share hygienist app download data from PostHog, focusing on blog-driven conversions.
Review backlog of article ideas. Approve more, esp. re: insurance, RCM, dental office marketing, patient scheduling.
Share list in Slack of potential blog topics focused on dental hygienist shortage theme. Use ChatGPT prompt results.
